headline: New Bispecific Antibody Characterization Workflow Might Change The Case For Investing In Bio-Techne (TECH)
summary: Earlier this week, Bio-Techne and Refeyn announced a first-of-its-kind integrated workflow that links Bio-Techne’s MauriceFlex™ icIEF fractionation system with Refeyn’s TwoMP mass photometry platform, enabling four-hour, single-molecule characterization of charge and size variants in bispecific antibodies and biosimilars. This workflow directly connects charge heterogeneity with molecular weight and aggregation using nanogram-level samples, potentially streamlining biotherapeutic...

headline: 3 Reasons TECH is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Bio-Techne’s stock price fell to $51.95. Shareholders have lost 13.8% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 10.7%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
